summary: Iteration 2 e2e testing of Gospel Roots Lawn Care. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed (health, quotes CRUD with validation, /auth/login success+invalid, /auth/me with/without token, /quotes auth-gated GET, /quotes/{id} auth-gated DELETE). Verified 'Quote notification sent' log line appears in backend logs after POST /api/quotes. Frontend: 21/21 Playwright assertions passed — /admin redirects to /admin/login when unauthed, login form renders with all data-testids, invalid creds show login-error, valid creds navigate to /admin and store grlc_admin_token in localStorage, inbox lists quotes with admin-quote-list/items, select-detail works, delete removes item, Sign out clears token and redirects, homepage Contact + Footer show real phone (903) 424-5931 / gospelrootslawncare@gmail.com / Gilmer, TX with correct tel:/mailto: hrefs, no Facebook/Instagram icons present, and contact form still submits successfully.

minor.issue: CORS middleware is added AFTER app.include_router. Starlette adds middleware in reverse, so this still works for /api routes, but the conventional pattern (add CORS before include_router) is more predictable. No functional impact observed.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI — consider lifespan context manager. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated @app.on_event handlers with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
(Optional) Move CORSMiddleware registration above api_router include for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth flow is solid: bcrypt hashing, JWT HS256 access token with 12h TTL, admin re-seed on password change, brute-force lockout (5 attempts / 15 min) per ip:email. JWT secret is in .env.
Bearer token in Authorization header is the only auth path used by the frontend; cookie code paths in get_current_user remain but are unused (CORS allow_credentials=False).
Public POST /api/quotes correctly uses asyncio.create_task(send_quote_notification(obj)) — non-blocking and wrapped in try/except so email failures cannot 500 the API.
AdminQuotes axios interceptor reads token from localStorage on every request — guards against stale token state in memory.
Contact.jsx still mixes HTML5 `required` with JS validation toast (carried over from iter 1) — JS validation branch unreachable. Minor UX inconsistency only.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed quotes during pytest and Playwright runs; all cleaned up via DELETE /api/quotes/{id} after testing (verified DB has no remaining TEST_ rows).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://gospel-lawn-pro.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth is Bearer-token only (localStorage key 'grlc_admin_token'); cookies are not used by the frontend (CORS allow_credentials=False, allow_origins=['*']). Key data-testids: login-form, login-input-email, login-input-password, login-submit, login-error; admin-quote-list, admin-quote-item-{id}, admin-quote-detail, admin-quote-delete, admin-refresh, admin-logout, admin-empty-state, admin-count, admin-user-email; contact-phone-link, contact-email-link, contact-form, contact-input-{name,email,phone,address,service,message}, contact-submit, contact-success. Email notifications go to gospelrootslawncare@gmail.com via Resend (onboarding@resend.dev sender). Memo /app/memory/test_credentials.md still mentions httpOnly cookies in its 'Notes' section — that's stale documentation since the switch to Bearer tokens; consider updating it (low priority).
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration. All review_request items verified end-to-end.
